calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Amended Petition For Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Jan-16-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Approving Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Oct-24-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Natalie Delagnes appearing for petitioner. Court wants to have a guardian ad litem appointed for Samuel. It should not be his mother or her counsel. Counsel will file a petition for appointment of guardian ad litem in this court and renotice the hearing. This petition is taken off calendar. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petition For Approving Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Sep-25-2006 Continued To Oct-24-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
